name: com.jelewow.unity-sheets-localization
description: Editor tool that imports and synchronizes localized strings and audio from Google Sheets and Google Drive into Unity Localization string/asset tables, with optional Addressables group assignment. Supports API key and service-account authentication and a pluggable, ScriptableObject-based parsing pipeline.

samples.description: A commented GoogleSheetsConfigurator that parses '<locale>-<suffix>' columns into '<id>-<suffix>' keys.
